creator: john@idlinc.com
text:
In /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/Makefile, the requirement for
jbigkit is specified as 0.9 and not the 1.0 that is included in the
ports distribution.

Fix: 

Change the version number of jbig in the ImageMagick Makefile from
\\.0\\.9 to \\.1\\.
How-To-Repeat: Install jbigkit 1.0 first and then try to make install ImageMagick
4.0.7 and watch as it complains about requiring to deinstall an older
versin of jbigkit and reinstall ;)
